mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts(section_id, author_id, title, content, pinned, featured, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{sectionId}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{pinned}, #{featured}, #{viewCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET pinned = #{value}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET featured = #{value}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, section_id, author_id, title, content, pinned, featured, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM posts WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST (#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
SELECT id, section_id, author_id, title, content, pinned, featured, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM posts WHERE section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, section_id, author_id, title, content, pinned, featured, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, section_id, author_id, title, content, pinned, featured, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM posts WHERE title LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
